category_sources: source_facts.description: Utility that creates projects from templates; official docs describe Cookiecutter as a command-line utility that creates projects from project templates at https://cookiecutter.readthedocs.io/en/stable/
display_name_sources: Official docs title and homepage use Cookiecutter at https://cookiecutter.readthedocs.io/en/stable/ and https://www.cookiecutter.io/
docs_sources: Official Cookiecutter documentation links to https://cookiecutter.readthedocs.io and GitHub at https://github.com/cookiecutter/cookiecutter
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it creates projects from templates; official docs describe command-line project-template generation and cross-language templates
